Interface IPixelReader

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control a pixel reader.

[Guid("8A3B7C7C-4ACE-4628-8C24-F67834FA2577")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IPixelReader

BandCount

The number of source bands.

int BandCount { get; }

Property Value

int

The source original cell size.

int

PixelType

The source pixel type.

rstPixelType PixelType { get; }

PyramidLevel

The current source pyramid level.

int PyramidLevel { get; set; }

int

Methods

GetResolution(int, out double, out double)

Gets X and Y resolution (cellsize) at a given level.

void GetResolution(int Level, out double pXResolution, out double pYResolution)

Parameters

Level int
pXResolution double
pYResolution double

Parameters

tlc IPnt

Snaps a given cellsize to a proper pyramid level.

Dx double
Dy double
